children.label: A
children.text: will, directly or through arrangements with other public or nonprofit private entities, routinely make available tuberculosis services to each individual receiving treatment for such disorders; and

children.label: B
children.text: in the case of an individual in need of such treatment who is denied admission to the program on the basis of the lack of the capacity of the program to admit the individual, will refer the individual to another provider of tuberculosis services.

children.label: A
children.text: counseling the individual with respect to tuberculosis;

children.label: B
children.text: testing to determine whether the individual has contracted such disease and testing to determine the form of treatment for the disease that is appropriate for the individual; and

children.label: C
children.text: providing such treatment to the individual.

children.label: A
children.text: with respect to individuals undergoing treatment for substance use disorders, the State will, subject to paragraph (3), carry out 1 or more projects to make available to the individuals early intervention services for HIV disease at the sites at which the individuals are undergoing such treatment;

children.label: B
children.text: for the purpose of providing such early intervention services through such projects, the State will make available from the grant the percentage that is applicable for the State under paragraph (4); and

children.label: C
children.text: the State will, subject to paragraph (5), carry out such projects only in geographic areas of the State that have the greatest need for the projects.

children.heading: Designated States
children.label: 2 Designated States
children.text: For purposes of this subsection, a State described in this paragraph is any State whose rate of cases of acquired immune deficiency syndrome is 10 or more such cases per 100,000 individuals (as indicated by the number of such cases reported to and confirmed by the Director of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention for the most recent calendar year for which such data are available).

children.heading: Use of existing programs regarding substance use disorders
children.label: 3 Use of existing programs regarding substance use disorders
children.text: With respect to programs that provide treatment services for substance use disorders, a funding agreement for a grant under for a designated State is that each such program participating in a project under paragraph (1) will be a program that began operation prior to the fiscal year for which the State is applying to receive the grant. A program that so began operation may participate in a project under paragraph (1) without regard to whether the program has been providing early intervention services for HIV disease.section 300x–21 of this title

children.heading: Applicable percentage regarding expenditures for services
children.label: 4 Applicable percentage regarding expenditures for services
i
children.text: For purposes of paragraph (1)(B), the percentage that is applicable under this paragraph for a designated State is, subject to subparagraph (B), the percentage by which the amount of the grant under for the State for the fiscal year involved is an increase over the amount specified in clause (ii).section 300x–21 of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: The amount specified in this clause is the amount that was reserved by the designated State involved from the allotment of the State under section 300x–1a of this title for fiscal year 1991 in compliance with section 300x–4(c)(6)(A)(ii) of this title (as such sections were in effect for such fiscal year).11See References in Text note below.1

children.label: B
children.text: If the percentage determined under subparagraph (A) for a designated State for a fiscal year is less than 2 percent (including a negative percentage, in the case of a State for which there is no increase for purposes of such subparagraph), the percentage applicable under this paragraph for the State is 2 percent. If the percentage so determined is 2 percent or more, the percentage applicable under this paragraph for the State is the percentage determined under subparagraph (A), subject to not exceeding 5 percent.

children.label: A
children.text: A funding agreement for a grant under for a designated State is that, if the State will carry out 2 or more projects under paragraph (1), the State will carry out 1 such project in a rural area of the State, subject to subparagraph (B).section 300x–21 of this title

children.label: i
children.text: there is insufficient demand in the State to carry out a project under paragraph (1) in any rural area of the State; or

children.label: ii
children.text: there are no rural areas in the State.

children.label: A
children.text: such services will be undertaken voluntarily by, and with the informed consent of, the individual; and

children.label: B
children.text: undergoing such services will not be required as a condition of receiving treatment services for substance use disorders or any other services.

children.label: A
children.text: The term “designated State” means a State described in paragraph (2).

children.label: i
children.text: appropriate pretest counseling;

children.label: ii
children.text: testing individuals with respect to such disease, including tests to confirm the presence of the disease, tests to diagnose the extent of the deficiency in the immune system, and tests to provide information on appropriate therapeutic measures for preventing and treating the deterioration of the immune system and for preventing and treating conditions arising from the disease;

children.label: iii
children.text: appropriate post-test counseling; and

children.label: iv
children.text: providing the therapeutic measures described in clause (ii).

children.label: C
children.text: The term “HIV disease” means infection with the etiologic agent for acquired immune deficiency syndrome.

children.heading: Expenditure of grant for compliance with agreements
children.label: c Expenditure of grant for compliance with agreements

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: A grant under may be expended for purposes of compliance with the agreements required in this section, subject to paragraph (2).section 300x–21 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: under any State compensation program, under any insurance policy, or under any Federal or State health benefits program (including the program established in title XVIII of the Social Security Act [ et seq.] and the program established in title XIX of such Act [ et seq.]); or42 U.S.C. 139542 U.S.C. 1396

children.label: B
children.text: by an entity that provides health services on a prepaid basis.

children.heading: Applicability of certain provision
children.label: d Applicability of certain provision
children.text: applies to this section (and to each other provision of this subpart).Section 300x–31 of this title
